browse.signature: void browse(var startFolder, bool forSaving, String wildcard, var callback)
browse.description: Opens a file browser to choose a file.

browseForDirectory.description: Opens a file browser to choose a directory.

browseForMultipleDirectories.description: Opens a file browser to select multiple directories.

browseForMultipleFiles.signature: void browseForMultipleFiles(var startFolder, String wildcard, var callback)
browseForMultipleFiles.description: Opens a file browser to select multiple files (to open).

decryptWithRSA.description: Decrypts the given string using a RSA public key.

descriptionOfSizeInBytes.description: Convert a file size in bytes to a neat string description.

encryptWithRSA.description: Encrypts the given string using a RSA private key.

findFiles.signature: var findFiles(var directory, String wildcard, bool recursive)
findFiles.description: Returns a list of all child files of a directory that match the wildcard.

findFileSystemRoots.description: Returns a list of all root drives of the current computer.

fromAbsolutePath.description: Returns a file object from an absolute path (eg. C:/Windows/MyProgram.exe).

fromReferenceString.description: Returns a file object for the given location type and the reference string which can either contain a wildcard like `{PROJECT_FOLDER}` or a full file path.

getBytesFreeOnVolume.description: Returns the number of free bytes on the volume of a given folder.

getFolder.description: Returns the current sample folder as File object.

getSystemId.description: Returns a unique machine ID that can be used to identify the computer.

loadExampleAssets.description: Loads a bunch of dummy assets (audio files, MIDI files, filmstrips) for use in snippets & examples.
